title: orchis × buelii
intro: Orchis × buelii, also known as Bumble Bee Orchid, is a hybrid orchid species that combines the characteristics of its parent species, Orchis mascula and Ophrys apifera. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Orchis × buelii include its potential to aid in the treatment of various ailments, such as respiratory issues, fever, and digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
